name: devto-client
description: Typed, zero-dependency client for the dev.to (Forem) v1 API
author: Leonid Svyatov <leonid@svyatov.com>

scripts.generate: npm run compose && npx -y openapi-typescript@7.13.0 spec/composed.json -o src/generated/types.ts && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/generate-signatures.ts && biome check --write src/generated/types.ts src/generated/signatures.ts src/generated/routing.ts
scripts.check:drift: node --experimental-strip-types scripts/generate-signatures.ts && biome check --write src/generated/signatures.ts src/generated/routing.ts && git diff --exit-code -- src/generated/signatures.ts src/generated/routing.ts
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npx publint && npx attw --pack . --profile esm-only
